candidate_a.title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
candidate_a.core_concept: Automated cross-referencing of usage logs against invoice line items to identify discrepancies.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A diagnostic tool that ingests PDF invoices and CSV usage reports to highlight mathematical mismatches for human review.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A Python script that parses three specific SaaS billing formats and generates a CSV report of flagged discrepancies. | Define schema for three target SaaS billing formats; Develop regex-based invoice parser; Build comparison logic for usage vs. billing; Create output report generator

candidate_b.title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
candidate_b.core_concept: An agent that autonomously cross-references service usage logs against line-item invoices.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: The agent extracts data from emailed invoices and uses API-accessible usage reports to flag potential overcharges for human review.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Support for exactly three major SaaS billing platforms processing synthetic email data.

candidate_a.title: The Community Preservative Co-op
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Waste of fresh aromatics and stock perishables leading to lost inventory and cooking motivation
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A local service that picks up bulk produce and returns it prepped for the freezer.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Process 10 bags of produce for 5 households over one week. | Define preservation methods (blanching, chopping); Recruit 5 households; Execute pickup and processing; Gather feedback on convenience

candidate_b.title: The Community Preservative Co-op
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Waste of fresh aromatics and stock perishables leading to lost inventory and cooking motivation
candidate_b.core_concept: A distributed subscription for dehydration/freezing labor as an utility
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Rotating service where home users get a pick-up that returns their raw grocery goods to them refined into flavor concentrates/freezer portions
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Ten bags processed for local home users over one pilot week including simple inventory storage tagging

candidate_a.title: Inventory Equilibrium Scout
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Balancing low inventory costs with delivery lead time requirements across geographic regions.
candidate_a.core_concept: Dynamic adjustment of inventory buffer stocks based on external shipping cost signals.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A decision-support tool that suggests buffer stock adjustments based on static carrier rate tables and historical throughput.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A dashboard that calculates and displays recommended buffer stock changes based on user-provided CSV data. | Model inventory buffer logic; Build CSV ingestion for throughput and rates; Develop recommendation engine; Create UI for manual approval of changes

candidate_b.title: Inventory Equilibrium Scout
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Balancing low inventory costs with delivery lead time requirements across geographic regions.
candidate_b.core_concept: Self-modifying replenishment rules based on localized shipping cost fluctuations.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Connecting historical fulfillment throughput with carrier pricing scrapers to update ERP buffer stocks automatically.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Agent capable of updating buffer stock values in one simulated cloud-based inventory system.

candidate_a.title: Affiliate Onboarding Concierge
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Zero experience or manual friction in onboarding new affiliate partners
candidate_a.core_concept: Templatized onboarding workflows for SaaS affiliate programs.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A service providing standardized onboarding documentation and CRM templates for small SaaS companies to manage affiliate partners.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Create a digital kit of templates and a 3-video training suite. | Draft onboarding templates.; Record 3 training videos.; Package as a digital product.; Test with 3 beta users.

candidate_b.title: Affiliate Onboarding Concierge
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Zero experience or manual friction in onboarding new affiliate partners
candidate_b.core_concept: Templatized automated workflow setup for new creator partnerships
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Service-as-software; human-managed onboarding docs paired with recurring CRM templates
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Onboarding document templates plus a 3-video 'how to setup' training suite

candidate_a.title: AI Coffee Palette Auditor
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Mismatch between generic inventory bean selection and local customer latent flavour preference data
candidate_a.core_concept: Analyzing customer waste patterns via bin monitoring combined with QR-scan-based beverage survey inputs to optimize shelf supply
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Aggregating digital intake metadata from specific location footfall into heat maps characterizing taste skew for future inventory orders
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Implementing one tablet kiosk feedback gatherer integrated with traditional POS output in a non-traditional coffee setting like a co-working shared area

candidate_b.title: AI Coffee Palette Auditor
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Mismatch between generic inventory bean selection and local customer latent flavour preference data
candidate_b.core_concept: Optimizing coffee inventory based on actual customer preference data.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A service that uses simple QR-code surveys at the point of sale to gather customer flavor preferences and adjust inventory accordingly.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A 1-month pilot in one co-working space using QR codes to survey coffee preferences. | Set up QR codes at one coffee station.; Collect survey data for 30 days.; Analyze data to recommend inventory changes.
